---
title: "Switch"
description: "Modern toggle for boolean settings."
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
library(shiny)
pkgload::load_all("..")
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)


```

A `block_switch()` is a modern alternative to a checkbox for binary choices.

```{r}
cat(as.character(block_switch("switch_id", label = "Enable notifications")))
```
